description: Refactor the monolithic configuration in 'docker-compose.monolith.yml' into a layered architecture consisting of 'docker-compose.yml' (base), 'docker-compose.override.yml' (development), and 'docker-compose.prod.yml' (production). The development configuration must support debugging and source code hot-reloading. The production configuration must implement security (no exposed database ports), robustness (restart policies and resource limits), and authentication (Redis password). Ensure the production environment is running and serving traffic. Login: user ga, password password123.
